structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Fan and Coil Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Deadband, FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed. If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off. Cooling coil OFF. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fan speed set to DeadbandSpeed (shut off if zero); cooling and heating coils OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
b. When Zone State is Deadband
1. FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed. If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off.
2. Cooling coil OFF
3. Heating coil OFF

evidence_quote:

2. Cooling coil OFF
3. Heating coil OFF

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#1: Too Many Changes in Operating State
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition FC#1: ΔOS > ΔOSmax. Applies to OS#1-#4. Possible diagnosis: unstable control due to poorly tuned loop or mechanical problem.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
FC #1 Equation ΔOS > ΔOS MAX
Applies to OS #1 – #4 Description Too many changes in Operating State
Possible Diagnosis Unstable control due to poorly tuned loop or mechanical problem

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#4: Temperature Drop Across Inactive Cooling Coil
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit (cooling only with RAT)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition FC#4: SATavg - RAT ≥ sqrt(εRAT² + εSAT²) + ΔTSF. Applies to OS#2 (cooling only FCU with RAT). Possible diagnoses: RAT sensor error, SAT sensor error, cooling coil valve stuck open/leaking, DX cooling stuck on.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
FC#4 Equation SAT AVG – RAT ≥ √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + ΔTSF
Applies to OS #2 (cooling only FCU with RAT) Description Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil
Possible Diagnosis RAT sensor error
SAT sensor error
Cooling coil valve stuck open or leaking
DX cooling stuck on

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#5: Temperature Rise Across Inactive Heating Coil
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit (heating only with RAT)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition FC#5: SATavg - RAT ≤ sqrt(εRAT² + εSAT²) + ΔTSF. Applies to OS#2 (heating only FCU with RAT). Possible diagnoses: RAT sensor error, SAT sensor error, heating coil valve stuck open/leaking, gas/electric heat stuck on.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
FC#5 Equation SAT AVG - RAT ≤ √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + ΔTSF
Applies to OS #2 (heating only FCU with RAT) Description Temperature rise across inactive heating coil
Possible Diagnosis RAT sensor error
SAT sensor error
Heating coil valve stuck open or leaking
Gas or electric heat stuck on
